title: Floppa's Fabulous
description: FO's like optimization with Cobblemon and some QoL and hand picked content for a Vanilla+ experience for Minecraft 1.20.1
body:
as smooth as Fabulously, cobblemon, vanilla+ experience, enhanced quality of life, tweaked and optimized shaderpack, what else would you need? ## ![Floppa's Fabulous tittle screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22cd34262e572ba6b85fc04be1f3f8a5f5047030.png)

Hopefully this modpack will give you that discover factor dopamine that Vanilla Minecraft gave you as a child while still feeling like the features here would be from the actual unmodded game ;) but also there's cobblemon. because who wouldn't want pokémon. ## **Featured mods:** - Cobblemon - Supplementaries - Amendments - Friends & Foes - Farmer's Delight - Handcrafted - Enchanted Vertical Slabs - Dungeons & Taverns - Red's More Structures - Nether 3.0 - ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village - Guard Villagers - Ribbits - Exposure - Easy Magic - Easy Anvils - Better Recipe Book - Sawmill - Stonecutter Salvage - What Are They Up To - Not Enough Animations - Appleskin - Eating Animation - LambDynamicLights - Zoomify - +­ a bunch of Fabulously's optimization - +­ ­a bunch of good lookin stuff Overimagined Shaders shaderpack will be enabled by default, if on low-end setup be sure to disable it by pressing [K] in-game ## This project is based on the [**Fabulously Optimized**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) modpack by the [**Fabulously Optimized Organization**](https://modrinth.com/organization/fabulously-optimized), which is licensed under the **BSD-3-Clause** License, as outlined below:

Neither this project nor I are affiliated with or endorsed by the **Fabulously Optimized Organization**. ## ### Sources worth mentioning: - original [**Overimagined Shaders**](https://github.com/isuewo/OverimaginedShaders) which has now turned into [**Euphoria Patches**](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches/versions) on Modrinth - **Mod Menu Helper** is an original resourcepack from the [**Fabulously Optimized**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) modpack on Modrinth **All other mods/resource/datapacks in this modpack are available within the [**Modrinth**](https://modrinth.com) domain and are under free use license**
